narrative:
28 Ohio House district has 88,972 registered voters, with 55.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 22.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 21.7%, a narrow Republican lean of 0.9 percentage points. Registration is trending bluer in younger age cohorts (1990s–2000s births lean +3.8% D−R vs -8.2% for 1950s–60s cohorts).
